translation: During the enforcement proceedings, a deposit account held by Shi under a certain bank was frozen by the court. Non-parties Zhan and Chen, due to business dealings with Shi’s son Shi Xiaoxiao, needed to pay for goods. In January 2025, Zhan instructed his wife Chen to transfer RMB 500,000 to Shi Xiaoxiao’s account. Consequently, Chen transferred RMB 500,000 to Shi’s account with the note “payment for Ganoderma lucidum powder,” intending for Shi to collect the payment on behalf of Shi Xiaoxiao. Because Shi’s account was frozen, the funds could not be transferred out, and the transaction was suspended. Zhan and Chen, on the grounds of a mistaken transfer, filed an objection to enforcement with the court, requesting that the RMB 500,000 payment be returned via the original route.
